category_sources: source_facts.description says NiFi is a system to process and distribute data; official Apache NiFi README repeats that description and lists data pipeline features.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is nifi; official Apache repository and documentation use Apache NiFi.
docs_sources: Official Apache NiFi documentation page links current version documentation, guides, and wiki; official component docs and administration guide are hosted on nifi.apache.org.
repo_sources: Official Apache NiFi documentation site links Source to GitHub; official GitHub repository is apache/nifi.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies processing and distributing data; official README describes cybersecurity, observability, event streams, generative AI data pipelines, browser UI, and scalable processing.
